settings.heading: Add the Gristle King to your order
settings.body: The Lil Heat warms the amp. The Gristle King is the drive and boost the whole legend was built on. Stack them and achieve succulence in the extreme.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order

settings.heading: Stack the Lil Heat with what you just bought
settings.body: The King holds court in the middle of the chain. The Lil Heat is the fiery little box that nudges the whole affair further into the fire. Three knobs, great aplomb, easy-peasy.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order

settings.heading: Add the Gristle King to your order
settings.body: New pickups deserve the drive Greg runs behind them. The Gristle King takes all that hum-free articulation and pushes it from bluesy simmer to searing sustain.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order

settings.heading: Stack the Gristle-Tone pickups with what you just bought
settings.body: You secured the effects chain. Now feed it the signal it deserves. The Gristle-Tone set pours hum-free single-coil succulence straight into the front of your new Monster.
settings.decline_label: No thanks, take me to my order
